{{Quote|I was so ''sick'' of bein' ''king'' and having ta act ''royal!'' Forget about finding a ''new'' throne—now I gotta get some royal ''bloodlust'' out of my ''royal'' system!|Blackart|<ref name="SW89" />}}
'''Blackart''' was the [[King/Legends|king]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Solay]], ruling the planet with an iron fist for about 50 years until [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. Blackart's tyranny gave rise to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-backed popular uprising that finally, with the aid of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], overthrew his rule. A hulking, powerful and bloodthirsty creature, Blackart was [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] following the revolution but swiftly escaped, planning to steal a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and find a new world to conquer. Blackart's rampage to the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] was waylaid by Skywalker, who defeated Blackart in combat and pressed the former dictator for information on the identity of a [[Raggold|traitor]] to the rebellion. Blackart pleaded ignorance, and Skywalker left him behind in the wreckage of his escape craft.<ref name="SW89" />
